 Hash Join  (cost=14.25..304.75 rows=25000 width=16) (actual time=0.121..1.283 rows=25000 loops=1)
   Hash Cond: (a.val = b.val)
   Buffers: shared hit=6
   ->  Seq Scan on joecap.t_items a  (cost=0.00..8.00 rows=500 width=8) (actual time=0.006..0.033 rows=500 loops=1)
         Buffers: shared hit=3
   ->  Hash  (cost=8.00..8.00 rows=500 width=8) (actual time=0.074..0.075 rows=500 loops=1)
         Buckets: 1024  Batches: 1  Memory Usage: 28kB
         Buffers: shared hit=3
         ->  Seq Scan on joecap.t_items b  (cost=0.00..8.00 rows=500 width=8) (actual time=0.002..0.020 rows=500 loops=1)
               Buffers: shared hit=3
Settings: search_path = 'joecap'
